torch_pattern:
x = x + residual  # optional, present when residual_input_tensor is passed
variance = x.pow(2).mean(-1, keepdim=True)
x = x * torch.rsqrt(variance + epsilon)
out = x * gamma  # weight= kwarg; stats all-gathered across cluster_axis (distributed RMSNorm)
weight_transform: gamma kept as 1-D [DIM] vector, converted to ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT and placed in DRAM; no numerical transform; replicated across mesh devices (norm weight is not sharded along cluster_axis)

placement_observations.source: test_example: gamma_tensor created with layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG immediately before fused_rms_minimal call

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-shape activation [1, 1, SEQ, DIM/num_devices] (width-fractured across cluster_axis)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: width-sharded per ln_sharded_progcfg core grid (block_w = DIM//32//NUM_CORES per core)

placement_observations.source: call_site: tt_ccl distributed rmsnorm part 1 — input passed with ln_sharded_progcfg, cluster_axis=1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: same shape regime as input activation

memory_config.shard_spec_template: output_memory_config (sharded, mirrors input shard spec in tests)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small stats buffer (per-device partial RMS stats, all-gathered)
